narrative:
Buckeye Local Sd (Ashtabula) school district has 7,117 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
